Spy vs. Spy: Dig for On-Line Gold

Neil Reisner The Miami Herald January 1997
Data & DatabasesJournalism & NewsroomTechnology

Explores various online resources and techniques for journalists to efficiently background a subject, highlighting the importance of expanding beyond traditional resources.

Time was when backgrounding a story subject wasn't for the fainthearted... Just get out there and dig.
